title: eucalyptus ebbanoensis subsp. photina
intro: Eucalyptus ebbanoensis subsp. photina, also known as Lemon-scented Gum, is a subspecies of the Eucalyptus ebbanoensis tree native to Australia. It is known for its distinctive lemon-like fragrance and is often used in aromatherapy and herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eucalyptus ebbanoensis subsp. photina include relief from colds and congestion, as well as skin and wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and topical creams, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
